corpus_v2.cost_basis: intentional declaration to exercise the Corpus V2 ESCALATE activation gate; actual scope is bounded artifact-only (motion package, scripts, no DB writes, no code changes), but Category: substantial is required to trigger ESCALATE behavior in activate-motion.mjs; the mismatch is documented in proposal.md and challenge.md C-1.
activation_reasons: Corpus V2 declared cost category is "substantial", which requires operator escalation before live activation.

notes: Initial bounded handoff for Corpus V2 ESCALATE-path proof. Cost:substantial triggers requires_operator_escalation at handoff time.
